max_trade_size.description: Block trades whose quantity exceeds the configured limit. Protects against oversized orders from a runaway agent.

max_trade_notional.description: Block trades whose dollar notional value exceeds the configured limit.

inbound_request_rate_limit.description: Limit inbound request rate at the proxy boundary. Set rpm to 0 to disable.

cumulative_trade_notional.description: Block cumulative dollar exposure across multiple orders within a short rolling window.

symbol_order_cooldown.description: Block repeat orders for the same symbol within a rolling time window. Prevents an agent from rapidly re-ordering the same ticker regardless of order type or quantity.

blocked_tickers.description: Block trades on tickers that appear in the restricted symbol list. Prevents unauthorized exposure to specific securities.

allowed_tickers.description: Draconian Mode: Block ALL trades except for those in this explicit allowlist.

allowed_asset_classes.description: Allow trading only for listed asset classes.

forbidden_tools.description: Hard-block method+path endpoint templates before rule-based checks.

max_replace_notional.description: Block order replacement requests when replacement notional exceeds policy limit.

prevent_market_order_upgrade.description: Block replacing limit orders with market orders.

max_close_notional.description: Block close-position requests above configured notional limit.

allowed_close_tickers.description: Allow close-position requests only for configured symbols.

log_dne_requests.description: Allow but audit do-not-exercise broker requests.

restricted_ticker_tool_rules.description: Block restricted ticker symbols when they are used by specific trade tools, regardless of argument field naming.

trading_window.description: Restrict automated trading to allowed UTC hours only. Disabled by default; enable and configure start_hour/end_hour to activate.
